'''kasufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foglamp|foglamp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foglamp|foglamp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kasufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæsifith|kæsifith]] || [[word:kæsifij|kæsifij]] || [[word:kæsifish|kæsifish]] || [[word:kæsifi|kæsifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kasusufuth|kasusufuth]] || [[word:kasusufuj|kasusufuj]] || [[word:kasusufush|kasusufush]] || [[word:kasusufu|kasusufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kasufuth|kasufuth]] || [[word:kasufuj|kasufuj]] || [[word:kasufush|kasufush]] || [[word:kasufu|kasufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kasuffuth|kasuffuth]] || [[word:kasuffuj|kasuffuj]] || [[word:kasuffush|kasuffush]] || [[word:kasuffuf|kasuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kasufuthu|kasufuthu]] || [[word:kasufuju|kasufuju]] || [[word:kasufushu|kasufushu]] || [[word:kasufuku|kasufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kasufuth|kasufuth]] || [[word:kasufuj|kasufuj]] || [[word:kasufush|kasufush]] || [[word:kasufu|kasufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kasufuthul|kasufuthul]] || [[word:kasufujul|kasufujul]] || [[word:kasufushul|kasufushul]] || [[word:kasufukul|kasufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kasufuthuthu|kasufuthuthu]] || [[word:kasufujuju|kasufujuju]] || [[word:kasufushushu|kasufushushu]] || [[word:kasufuku|kasufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kasufuthun|kasufuthun]] || [[word:kasufujun|kasufujun]] || [[word:kasufushun|kasufushun]] || [[word:kasufukun|kasufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kasufuthuoro|kasufuthuoro]] || [[word:kasufujuoro|kasufujuoro]] || [[word:kasufushuoro|kasufushuoro]] || [[word:kasufukuoro|kasufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
